justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with exact quotes from Bird's out-of-scope designation and MJ's inclusion of category/price/brand filters. Both conflicting agents attributed by name. Escalation routed to Coach K (not Shaq) with specific options for resolution. No brief produced containing faceted filtering — the agent blocked on the contradiction rather than silently including it. In-scope content (keyword search with AND logic, BM25 relevance sorting) correctly identified as agreed-upon. Escalation asks the specific question of which scope ruling to follow for this release.

observations.text: Exact quote from Bird's out-of-scope note and precise enumeration of MJ's conflicting filter fields (category term filter, price range, brand term filter)
Routed to Coach K with three concrete resolution options rather than a vague escalation
Recommendation correctly defers to Bird as domain authority, consistent with team roles
Low confidence score (35) appropriately reflects inability to produce a complete brief due to unresolved contradiction
No brief or handoff content produced that includes faceted filtering — cleanly blocked rather than hedging
